summary:
Comprehensive setup guide for integrating OpenClaw AI agent framework with Sierra Blu Realty. Covers:
- What OpenClaw is and why it's relevant
- All 5 configuration files created (SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md, openclaw.json, .env.example)
- Top 8 recommended skills from ClawHub/GitHub with descriptions
- Step-by-step installation instructions for Windows
- Telegram and WhatsApp bot configuration
- Security best practices including DM pairing and sandbox mode
- Architecture diagram showing the full integration flow
- Next steps checklist
